summary_markdown: This chunk describes a smoke test (trigger #3) to verify a source-path normalization fix. It specifies that only a newly added reference file should be processed, that integration must normalize paths like /src/foo.py to src/, and that the output must include manual, source files, assumptions, and open questions.
clauses: Process only this newly added reference file.
The integration step must accept paths like /src/foo.py and normalize them under src/.
Output must contain a manual, source files, assumptions, and open questions.
